testcase.name: test_register_honeypot_catches_bot
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_anti_bot_protection_v343.py:50: in test_register_honeypot_catches_bot assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 429: {"detail":"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
